title: Schema Lightdash Metric Merge
description: Values that can be merged in to override values on a metric

compact.description: The compact status that will be applied to the column in lightdash

description.description: The description that will be applied to the metric in lightdash

group_label.description: The group label that will be applied to the column in lightdash

hidden.description: The hidden status that will be applied to the column in lightdash

sql.description: The custom sql expression to generate the metric
